title: Origins: Weapon Master
description: After defeating the Demon King, he embarks on an adventure to find Panda Chen for new training in preparation for the Battle of the Celestials.
body:
For this to work, you need the Origins Mod.
You can choose a different character to become your origin to experience Minecraft.

This Origin is Coded in newest version of origin, so for lower versions or forge version, there may having bugs that not expected.

# Weapon Master

**After defeating the Demon King with other warriors, he embarks on an adventure to find Panda Chen for new training in preparation for the Battle of the Celestials.**

## Core System
- 🍖 Raw Power
  - Your active ability consume hungers. It will consume health instead if no hungers.
## Core Survival Power
- 🔨 Forge
  - You know of a better forging material, Using (Secondary Active) while holding any Smith's Template in offhand, you can forge any maximum 5 enchantment based on the item held.
- 💎 Hero of the world
  - The villagers and the Iron Golem love you because you were one of the warriors who defeated the Demon King, and your vision no longer gray.
- 🛡️ Every Armor is useful
  - Armor won't give defence point base on material. All part will apply 5 defence point.
## Core Fighting Power
- ⚔️ Tool Master
  - Different Tools give you different Power. Power level increase base on total enchantment level on it when on hand.
    - Sword : Receive 3s extra Movement when hit.(+Total enchantment levelx0.03)
    - Axe/Mace : Receive 3s extra Armor Point when hit.(+Total enchantment levelx0.5)
    - Pickaxe/Hoe/Shovel : Receive extra Break Speed when Mining.(x(1+Total enchantment levelx0.5))
    - Range Weapon : Receive extra Damage on Projectiles, Receive extra Jump Power when hit.(+(1+Total enchantment levelx0.25))/(+Total enchantment levelx0.05)
    - Shield : Receive extra Damage.(+Total enchantment levelx0.5)
- 🩸 Epinephrine
  - Using (Primary Active), You receive regeneration. Receive Speed instead when no hunger.
